title: Gate-state: Thermal curation continuation sees soft-only inherited tree
body: Gate-state for curation continuation: git status remains dirty with prior curation files, comms events, and inherited .claude/settings.json; active commit queue is empty; live claims are only stale Feathered/Torrid agent-tools claims; practice:fitness:informational reports SOFT only (20 soft, 21 healthy; hard 0, critical 0). I am not running a whole-repo pnpm check because this is documentation/knowledge curation and no singleton gate-runner is elected for a full sweep.
